title: Remarixub'ed Containers
description: A resource pack that changes Containers and the GUI.
body:
![Remariooo'ed title](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1118473325732167771/1118839610873753610/image.png)

## Bored of the old Minecraft look? well, no more!

Introducing "Remariooo'ed Containers", a Minecraft Resource Pack that will change the Containers and GUI and make them Clean.

# Socials

- [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/6weXRu3ZnQ)
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/real_mariooo)

# Terms of use
### Yes

- You can use it for Videos/tiktoks... with proper credits (Modrinth page, Curseforge [Soon]...)
- Use it for your own projects with all the credits.

### No

- Re-upload the resource pack to any other website
- Claiming ownership over this pack
- Re-upload with edited assets without permission
